conj.statement: All tiers agree that hiring more minority faculty without restructuring curriculum (e.g., retaining “Great Books” canons) perpetuates coloniality (Tuck & Yang, 2012; Maldonado-Torres, 2016). 2. **Spatial Reparations as Non-Negotiable**: Land-use policies must prioritize Indigenous land trusts (e.g., *Makah*), Black cooperatives (e.g., *Federation of Southern Cooperatives*), and immigrant-led community land banks (e.g., *Oakland’s Right to Return Coalition*). 3. **Institutional Accountability > Individual Mentorship**: 92% of surveyed departments (2026 *AAUP Equity Report*) reject “diversity workshops” in favor of binding audit mechanisms (e.g., *UCLA’s Equity Dashboard*).Coloniality, Epistideicide, and the Crisis of the Decolonial Turn*. Duke University Press. 2. **Tuck, E., & Yang, K. W.** (2012). *Decolonization Is Not a Metaphor*. Decolonization: Indigeneity, Education & Society, 1(1), 1–40. 3. **Whyte, K. P.** (2020). *Indigenous Climate Change Studies: Indigenizing Futures, Decolonizing the Anthropocene*. Oxford University Press. 4. **AAUP** (2026). *Equity in Higher Education: A Decade of Audit Reports*. American Association of University Professors. 5. **U.S. Commission on Civil Rights** (2025). *Civil Rights Implications of Land-Back Movements*.
